args:
Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Routing Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/trie-router/node.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Routing Read/Write Ledger

This document provides a comprehensive ledger of all files related to the routing system in Hono. Each file section includes its purpose, notable names, and a simple functional note.

---

## src/hono.ts

- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase and sets up the default routing system using SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallback.
- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions
- Simple note: The Hono class constructor instantiates a SmartRouter by default with two routers: RegExpRouter as primary and TrieRouter as backup.

## src/hono-base.ts

- Purpose: Base class providing shared functionality for all Hono applications including error handling, middleware management, and request composition.
- Names noticed: HonoBase, ErrorHandler, compose, onError, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
- Simple note: Contains error handling logic with onError() method and the compose function for middleware chain management.

## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export file for PatternRouter router implementation.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter
- Simple note: Re-exports PatternRouter class from the router.ts file.

## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements PatternRouter using JavaScript RegExp patterns for route matching with support for wildcard routes and dynamic parameter extraction.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, emptyParams, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, RegExp, params
- Simple note: Stores routes as [RegExp, method, handler] tuples and matches paths using compiled regular expressions with capture groups for dynamic segments.

## src/router/linear-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export file for LinearRouter router implementation.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter
- Simple note: Re-exports LinearRouter class from the router.ts file.

## src/router/linear-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements LinearRouter using linear route matching with special handling for wildcard (*) routes and labeled parameters.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, checkOptionalParameter, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, emptyParams
- Simple note: Stores routes as [method, path, handler] arrays and matches by linearly iterating through routes with custom path parsing logic for labels and wildcards.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export file for RegExpRouter router implementation.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
- Simple note: Re-exports RegExpRouter class and PreparedRegExpRouter helper functions for serializer support.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements RegExpRouter with deferred compilation and middleware support, combining Trie structure with RegExp generation for efficient matching.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Matcher, HandlerWithMetadata, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, buildWildcardRegExp, findMiddleware, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, emptyParam, PATH_ERROR
- Simple note: Builds a trie structure internally, compiles to a single RegExp matcher, and supports middleware via a separate middleware structure.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts

- Purpose: Defines core type interfaces for the RegExp router matching system.
- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, ParamAssocArray, Result, Router, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, emptyParam, match
- Simple note: Type definitions for the Matcher interface as [RegExp, HandlerData[], StaticMap] tuple used throughout RegExpRouter.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts

- Purpose: Implements PreparedRegExpRouter for serializing router configuration and enabling external router initialization from serialized state.
- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, buildAndExportAllMatchers
- Simple note: Allows building a router once and reconstructing it later using JSON serialization of the internal matcher state.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Implements Node class representing trie nodes for the RegExp router with pattern matching support.
- Names noticed: Node, Context, ParamAssocArray, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR
- Simple note: Builds a trie where nodes store either literal tokens or regex patterns, tracking variable indices for parameter extraction.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts

- Purpose: Implements Trie class for building the trie structure and generating the final RegExp pattern from trie nodes.
- Names noticed: Trie, Context, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap, buildRegExp, compareKey
- Simple note: Processes paths into tokens, builds a trie structure, and converts it back to a RegExp via recursive string building.

## src/router/smart-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export file for SmartRouter router implementation.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter
- Simple note: Re-exports SmartRouter class from the router.ts file.

## src/router/smart-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements SmartRouter as a failover router that tries multiple routers in sequence and adopts the successful one.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, activeRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError
- Simple note: Holds multiple routers and routes in a buffer, then adds routes to each router sequentially until one successfully matches.

## src/router/trie-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export file for TrieRouter router implementation.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter
- Simple note: Re-exports TrieRouter class from the router.ts file.

## src/router/trie-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements TrieRouter using a simple trie structure with method and path-based node traversal for matching.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, checkOptionalParameter, Node
- Simple note: Stores handlers in trie nodes keyed by method, and matches by traversing the path while checking for handlers at the end.

## src/router/trie-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Implements Node class for TrieRouter with method-based handler storage and pattern matching.
- Names noticed: Node, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, hasChildren
- Simple note: Trie node storing handler sets indexed by HTTP method, with patterns for dynamic segments and multiple path traversal during search.

## src/router/common.case.test.ts

- Purpose: Shared test suite for all routers with common test cases for consistent testing across router implementations.
- Names noticed: runTest, RunnerTestSuite, task, match, router, Method, Params, Router, getSuiteHierarchy, SupportedPathError
- Simple note: Provides a generic test runner that can be extended by each router's test file with custom skip conditions.

## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Unit tests for PatternRouter including integration with common test suite and Pattern-specific test cases.
- Names noticed: Pattern, runTest, PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, Duplicate param name, Trailing slash
- Simple note: Tests PatternRouter behavior including skipping duplicate param names test and verifying trailing slash handling.

## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Unit tests for LinearRouter including integration with common test suite and Linear-specific test cases.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, runTest, Multi match, params, Capture regex pattern, Complex, Trailing slash, Skip part
- Simple note: Tests LinearRouter including scenarios where label+star combinations are unsupported.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Unit tests for RegExpRouter including integration with common test suite and RegExp-specific edge cases.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, runTest, Ambiguous, Multiple handlers, static and dynamic, Capture Group, Complex capturing group
- Simple note: Tests RegExpRouter for ambiguous routes, duplicate parameters, and complex regex patterns that cause UnsupportedPathError.

## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Unit tests for SmartRouter including integration with common test suite and SmartRouter-specific behavior.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, runTest, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, routers
- Simple note: Tests SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter combination using the standard common test suite.

## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Unit tests for TrieRouter including integration with common test suite.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest
- Simple note: Tests TrieRouter using the standard common test suite to verify consistent behavior across all routers.

## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts

- Purpose: Unit tests for TrieRouter Node class specifically.
- Names noticed: Node, blog failed
- Simple note: Tests the Node class implementation including blog test scenarios.

---

## Cross-File Checklist

### pattern-router
- src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
- src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
- src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
- src/router/common.case.test.ts

### linear-router
- src/router/linear-router/index.ts
- src/router/linear-router/router.ts
- src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
- src/router/common.case.test.ts

### reg-exp-router
- src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
- src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
- src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
- src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
- src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
- src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
- src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
- src/router/common.case.test.ts

### smart-router
- src/router/smart-router/index.ts
- src/router/smart-router/router.ts
- src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
- src/router/common.case.test.ts

### trie-router
- src/router/trie-router/index.ts
- src/router/trie-router/router.ts
- src/router/trie-router/node.ts
- src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
- src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
- src/router/common.case.test.ts

---

**Report:** Only `bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md` was created.
